name: ExtensionMeasureReport_Group_Stratifier_LinkId
title: R5: Pointer to specific stratifier from Measure (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.linkId` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MeasureReport.group.stratifier.linkId` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.linkId` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.linkId` has a context of MeasureReport.group.stratifier based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MeasureReport`.
Element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.linkId` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: The stratifier from the Measure that corresponds to this stratifier in the MeasureReport resource.
